'''dhakoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygofer|pygofer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygofer|pygofer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhakoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dhækeketh || dhækekej || dhækekesh || dhækeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || dhakokokoth || dhakokokoj || dhakokokosh || dhakokoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || dhakokoth || dhakokoj || dhakokosh || dhakoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || dhakofkofth || dhakofkofj || dhakofkofsh || dhakofkof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhakokotho || dhakokojo || dhakokosho || dhakokoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhakokoth || dhakokoj || dhakokosh || dhakoko
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhakokothol || dhakokojol || dhakokoshol || dhakokokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhakokoothotho || dhakokoojojo || dhakokooshosho || dhakokooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhakokothon || dhakokojon || dhakokoshon || dhakokokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhakokothooro || dhakokojooro || dhakokoshooro || dhakokokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
